response.justification: Bogdan has extensive software development experience (15+ years), including roles as a Staff Software Engineer and Senior Developer, with direct experience in developer tooling (MCP code generators, AI-agent infrastructure, CI/CD systems) and mobile platform knowledge (Apple TV/iOS apps). His leadership background includes mentoring teams, organizing workshops, and hands-on engineering management. However, his people management experience is lighter (primarily technical leadership), and his developer tools experience is recent (under 3 years). His lack of a Master's/PhD and mobile-platform-specific leadership roles slightly reduce alignment with preferred criteria.
strengths: Strong technical leadership in developer tooling and CI/CD infrastructure (e.g., GitLab setup, CI servers, MCP frameworks)
Proven mobile platform expertise (built and maintained Apple TV/iOS apps, ranked in top 10)
Cross-stack experience with deep technical contributions in languages like DLang, TypeScript, and D for high-performance systems
concerns: Limited direct people management experience (only 2 years in leadership roles, mostly technical)
Developer tools experience is recent (under 3 years) and not fully aligned with build systems/testing infrastructure
No explicit experience leading organizational change or managing mid-to-senior teams in a structured engineering productivity setting
